productName: Gummyshark ( I ) Chef Joe's - Flipside Distillate Disposable 1g
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with GummyShark oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Simple, smooth, portable, a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
